description_long: This bungalow features a compact, single-story structure with a flat roof and a simple, rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are predominantly white, punctuated by large arched windows and a prominent wooden front door. The interior layout is visible, showing a staircase, kitchen, living area, and dining space, with a clear open-plan design. The floor plan is partially displayed adjacent to the building, highlighting the arrangement of rooms and furniture. The windows are symmetrically placed on the front and side facades, providing ample natural light. The overall design is modern and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on practicality.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with arched windows, a wooden front door, and an open-plan interior layout. The design is simple, functional, and features a flat roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large arched windows and the main wooden entrance door.
description_view_1: Side view with a single arched window and a clear view of the staircase and kitchen area inside.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door, dining area, and additional windows, with the floor plan visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window and partial visibility of the dining area.
